title: Mobile preview tab with item drawer integration
purpose: Provides a full-screen preview interface for diagrams and documents on mobile devices, with a slide-up drawer for browsing items.
module_context: Exports a MobilePreviewTab component that manages item selection, displays previews, and controls an item drawer. Uses Zustand for state management and includes data loading hooks.

steps.content: Initialize state for drawer open status.
Extract session data and data loading functions from the store.
Combine diagrams and documents into a single items array sorted by last modified time.
Determine the currently selected item based on diagram or document ID.
Define a callback to handle item selection and update the store.
Automatically open the drawer if no item is selected and items exist.
Render the top bar with item name, type icon, and browse button when an item is selected.
Render the appropriate preview component (Mermaid or Markdown) based on item type.
Validate that a session is active.
IF the selected item is a diagram, load the diagram with content.
ELSE load the document with content.
Close the item drawer after selection.
IF the selected item is a diagram, return a diagram type icon.
ELSE return a document type icon.
